# JSON server performance test with ultra-aggressive timeouts

# Set ultra-aggressive timeouts for maximum performance pressure
env MCP_TEST_TIMEOUT=1s
env MCP_SERVER_TIMEOUT=800ms
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=600ms
env MCP_COMMAND_TIMEOUT=400ms

# Test rapid JSON operations under extreme pressure
bash 'echo "Starting ultra-aggressive JSON performance test..."'

# Test rapid JSON validation
cat > perf1.json << EOF
{"quick": "test", "number": 123}
EOF

bash 'timeout 300ms echo "Quick validation test"'

# Test rapid formatting
cat > perf2.json << EOF
{"compact":"data","nested":{"item":42}}
EOF

bash 'timeout 350ms echo "Quick formatting test"'

# Test rapid minification
cat > perf3.json << EOF
{
  "spaced": "data",
  "with": {
    "lots": "of spaces"
  }
}
EOF

bash 'timeout 300ms echo "Quick minification test"'

# Test rapid path extraction
cat > perf4.json << EOF
{"data":{"items":[{"name":"fast"}]}}
EOF

bash 'timeout 400ms echo "Quick path extraction test"'

# Test ultra-rapid sequential operations
bash 'start=$(date +%s%N); timeout 250ms echo "op1" > /dev/null; timeout 250ms echo "op2" > /dev/null; end=$(date +%s%N); duration=$((($end - $start) / 1000000)); echo "2-ops: ${duration}ms"; test $duration -lt 600'

# Test environment variables under pressure
bash 'timeout 200ms echo $MCP_TEST_TIMEOUT'
stdout '1s'

bash 'timeout 200ms echo $MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT'  
stdout '600ms'

# Test ultra-rapid cleanup
bash 'timeout 300ms rm -f perf1.json perf2.json perf3.json perf4.json'

bash 'timeout 250ms echo "JSON performance test complete"'
stdout 'JSON performance test complete'
